# Generates C++ stubs for asr.proto.
# Go stubs are generated by `make asr-proto-go` (calls protoc-gen-go directly)
# and live under backend/internal/infrastructure/asr/pb/.

set(PROTO_FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/asr.proto
)

set(GENERATED_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated)
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${GENERATED_DIR})

# Locate plugins shipped with the find_package(gRPC) module.
get_target_property(PROTOC_EXE  protobuf::protoc    LOCATION)
get_target_property(GRPC_PLUGIN gRPC::grpc_cpp_plugin LOCATION)

set(PB_SRCS
    ${GENERATED_DIR}/asr.pb.cc
    ${GENERATED_DIR}/asr.grpc.pb.cc
)
set(PB_HDRS
    ${GENERATED_DIR}/asr.pb.h
    ${GENERATED_DIR}/asr.grpc.pb.h
)

add_custom_command(
    OUTPUT  ${PB_SRCS} ${PB_HDRS}
    COMMAND ${PROTOC_EXE}
        --proto_path=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
        --cpp_out=${GENERATED_DIR}
        --grpc_out=${GENERATED_DIR}
        --plugin=protoc-gen-grpc=${GRPC_PLUGIN}
        ${PROTO_FILES}
    DEPENDS ${PROTO_FILES}
    COMMENT "Generating C++ stubs for rekall.asr.v1"
    VERBATIM
)

add_library(rekall_asr_proto STATIC ${PB_SRCS} ${PB_HDRS})
target_include_directories(rekall_asr_proto PUBLIC ${GENERATED_DIR})
target_link_libraries(rekall_asr_proto PUBLIC
    protobuf::libprotobuf
    gRPC::grpc++
)

# Suppress warnings for generated code only.
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(rekall_asr_proto PRIVATE /W0)
else()
    target_compile_options(rekall_asr_proto PRIVATE -w)
endif()
